name: answer-platform
description: OctoBus package for Chaitin Answer-Platform Advanced Threat Analysis and Warning System — alarm search, block rules, firewall blacklist, and asset management.

Answer_Platform.Answer_Platform/Login.name: login
Answer_Platform.Answer_Platform/Login.description: Login to Answer-Platform and return a session token.

Answer_Platform.Answer_Platform/GetAlarm.name: get-alarm
Answer_Platform.Answer_Platform/GetAlarm.description: Get detailed information for a single alarm.

Answer_Platform.Answer_Platform/UpdateBl.name: update-block-rule-status
Answer_Platform.Answer_Platform/UpdateBl.description: Enable or disable a block rule.

Answer_Platform.Answer_Platform/CreateBl.name: create-blacklist
Answer_Platform.Answer_Platform/CreateBl.description: Add IPs to the blacklist for blocking.

Answer_Platform.Answer_Platform/GetSyste.name: get-system-status
Answer_Platform.Answer_Platform/GetSyste.description: Get system health and status information.

Answer_Platform.Answer_Platform/GetAgent.name: get-agent-groups
Answer_Platform.Answer_Platform/GetAgent.description: Get available agent/probe groups (required for platform-mode deployments).
